description:
The quarterly preventive maintenance cycle has just been completed at St. Mary's Medical Center. Log the following four maintenance service records in Snipe-IT (http://localhost:8000) for equipment serviced during February/March 2025. All referenced assets and suppliers already exist in the system.

Asset ASSET-0001:
- Supplier: Acme Corp
- Maintenance Type: Maintenance
- Title: Annual preventive maintenance - Q1 2025
- Start Date: 2025-02-15
- Completion Date: 2025-02-18
- Cost: 450.00
- Notes: Replaced cooling fans, cleaned internals, firmware updated to v3.2.1

Asset ASSET-0002:
- Supplier: Dell
- Maintenance Type: Repair
- Title: Hard drive replacement - critical failure
- Start Date: 2025-02-20
- Completion Date: 2025-02-22
- Cost: 275.00
- Notes: Original 500GB HDD failed with bad sectors. Replaced with 1TB SSD. Data restored from backup.

Asset ASSET-0003:
- Supplier: Lenovo
- Maintenance Type: Upgrade
- Title: RAM upgrade for radiology workstation
- Start Date: 2025-03-01
- Completion Date: 2025-03-01
- Cost: 180.00
- Notes: Upgraded from 16GB to 32GB DDR4. Required for new PACS viewer software.

Asset ASSET-0005:
- Supplier: HP
- Maintenance Type: Maintenance
- Title: Printer quarterly maintenance
- Start Date: 2025-02-25
- Completion Date: (leave blank - this maintenance is still in progress)
- Cost: 320.00
- Notes: Scheduled fuser replacement and calibration. Parts on backorder - awaiting completion.
